sentences.arabic: نَظَّمَتِ الْمَدْرَسَةُ رِحْلَةً لِلطُّلَّابِ الأُسْبُوعَ الْمَاضِيَ.
sentences.translation: Škola je organizovala izlet za učenike prošle sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The school organized a trip for students last week.

sentences.arabic: زَارَ الطُّلَّابُ مَتْحَفًا كَبِيرًا فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su posjetili veliki muzej u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: The students visited a large museum in the city center.

sentences.arabic: رَأَوْا صُوَرًا قَدِيمَةً وَأَشْيَاءَ تَارِيخِيَّةً كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Vidjeli su stare slike i mnoge historijske predmete.
sentences.translationEn: They saw old paintings and many historical objects.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ الطُّلَّابُ إِلَى الْمَدْرَسَةِ وَهُمْ سُعَدَاءُ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su se vratili u školu sretni.
sentences.translationEn: The students returned to school happy.
